nasb.text: in order to change the appearance of things your servant Joab has done this thing. But my lord is wise, like the wisdom of the angel of God, to know all that is in the earth.”

esv.text: In order to change the course of things your servant Joab did this. But my lord has wisdom like the wisdom of the angel of God to know all things that are on the earth.”

cnv.text: 王的僕人約押這樣作，為要挽回這件事。我主有智慧，像　神使者的智慧一樣，能知道世上的一切事。”

ccb.text: 他这样做是希望扭转局面。我主如上帝的天使一样有智慧，洞悉天下之事。”
